summary: Iteration 7 - Edit Client Feature and New Platforms (YouTube, Reddit, Booking.com). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified Edit Client modal with all fields editable, status toggle, platform toggles, save functionality. All 9 platforms configurable with proper icons.

feature_verification.edit_client_dropdown_visible: PASS - Edit Client option visible in dropdown menu with Edit2 icon
feature_verification.edit_dialog_opens_with_prefilled_data: PASS - Dialog opens with client name, email, business type pre-filled
feature_verification.status_toggle_visible_in_edit: PASS - Account Status toggle only visible in edit mode (not create)
feature_verification.status_toggle_functional: PASS - Toggle changes is_active and persists on save
feature_verification.enabled_platforms_toggleable: PASS - Can click platform buttons to enable/disable
feature_verification.save_changes_updates_client: PASS - Toast 'Client Grand Hotel updated!' shown, changes persist
feature_verification.platform_configs_youtube: PASS - YouTube config with OAuth2, correct Google scopes
feature_verification.platform_configs_reddit: PASS - Reddit config with OAuth2, scopes: read, submit, edit, identity
feature_verification.platform_configs_booking: PASS - Booking.com config with api_key auth type
feature_verification.all_9_platforms_in_configs: PASS - google, tripadvisor, facebook, instagram, linkedin, x, youtube, reddit, booking
feature_verification.youtube_icon_displays: PASS - Red YouTube icon (FaYoutube) displayed correctly
feature_verification.reddit_icon_displays: PASS - Orange Reddit icon (FaReddit) displayed correctly
feature_verification.booking_icon_displays: PASS - Blue building icon (Building2 from lucide) displayed correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Edit Client uses same modal component as Create Client with conditional rendering for edit-only fields (is_active toggle)
ClientUpdate model in backend properly validates optional fields for partial updates
Platform icons using react-icons for YouTube (FaYoutube) and Reddit (FaReddit), lucide for Booking (Building2)
All new platforms have correct OAuth2/API key configuration in PLATFORM_CONFIGS

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All edit client features and platform icons verified

mocked_apis_list: OAuth token exchange for YouTube/Reddit - real OAuth providers but test credentials
Platform API calls for posting/replying remain mocked

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Edit Client features fully tested: 1) Edit button in dropdown, 2) Pre-filled dialog, 3) Status toggle (edit-only), 4) Platform toggles, 5) Save persists changes. All 9 platforms verified in PLATFORM_CONFIGS: google, tripadvisor, facebook, instagram, linkedin, x, youtube, reddit, booking. YouTube uses Google OAuth2 (same as Google platform), Reddit has PRAW-compatible OAuth2 scopes, Booking.com uses API key auth. Platform icons display correctly using react-icons (FaYoutube, FaReddit) and lucide (Building2 for Booking).
